question_fr: Lister les formats des documents disponibles.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT format FROM documents;

question_fr: Combien de documents ont un message d'erreur ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE error_message IS NOT NULL AND error_message != '';

question_fr: Afficher les SIRET des documents traités avec succès.
sql: SELECT d.siret FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS';

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne des pages par document ?
sql: SELECT AVG(nb_pages) FROM documents;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents par état (code) ?
sql: SELECT s.code, COUNT(d.document_id) FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id GROUP BY s.code;

question_fr: Comparer le nombre de documents entre les années 2023 et 2024.
sql: SELECT document_year, COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY document_year;

question_fr: Lister les valeurs extraites pour le champ financier 'D001' pour toutes les communes.
sql: SELECT er.value, d.city_name FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001';

question_fr: Calculer le taux de réussite d'extraction par année (basé sur l'état des documents).
sql: WITH doc_status AS (SELECT d.document_year, s.code FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id) SELECT document_year, COUNT(CASE WHEN code = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS success_rate FROM doc_status GROUP BY document_year;

question_fr: Trouver les communes avec le plus grand nombre total de pages de documents.
sql: SELECT city_name, SUM(nb_pages) AS total_pages FROM documents GROUP BY city_name ORDER BY total_pages DESC;

question_fr: Afficher les documents qui ont des résultats d'extraction avec des messages d'avertissement.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT d.* FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning != '';

question_fr: Compter le nombre de champs financiers distincts extraits par document.
sql: SELECT document_id, COUNT(DISTINCT safir_field_id) AS distinct_fields FROM extraction_results GROUP BY document_id;

question_fr: Identifier les années où il y a des documents avec des erreurs d'extraction.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT d.document_year FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error != '';

question_fr: Analyser la tendance des valeurs numériques pour le champ 'Conso' sur les années, en calculant la moyenne par année.
sql: SELECT d.document_year, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_conso FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND er.value != '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Comparer les agrégats financiers entre les types de budget BP et BA pour un champ spécifique comme 'D001'.
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_value FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND er.value != '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND d.budget_type IN ('BP', 'BA') GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Détecter les résultats d'extraction qui ont été corrigés via les feedbacks, et afficher les valeurs avant et après correction.
sql: SELECT er.safir_field_id, er.value AS original_value, rf.corrected_value, d.city_name FROM extraction_results er LEFT JOIN resultfeedbacks rf ON er.result_id = rf.result_id JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE rf.corrected_value IS NOT NULL;

question_fr: Calculer pour chaque commune le ratio entre deux indicateurs financiers, par exemple entre 'D001' et 'DF011', pour évaluer la structure de la dette.
sql: WITH financial_data AS (SELECT d.city_name, er.safir_field_id, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS numeric_value FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id IN ('D001', 'DF011') AND er.value != '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL) SELECT city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN numeric_value ELSE 0 END) AS total_debt, SUM(CASE WHEN safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN numeric_value ELSE 0 END) AS other_indicator, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN numeric_value ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN SUM(CASE WHEN safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN numeric_value ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN numeric_value ELSE 0 END) ELSE NULL END AS debt_ratio FROM financial_data GROUP BY city_name HAVING debt_ratio IS NOT NULL;

question_fr: Quels types de format de document (mask) ont été utilisés pour les budgets de l'année 2023 ?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT mask FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Affichez les documents qui ont plus de 200 pages, avec leur nom de commune et année.

sql: SELECT mask, AVG(nb_pages) AS moyenne_pages FROM documents WHERE nb_pages IS NOT NULL GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Combien de documents n'ont aucun message d'erreur enregistré ?

question_fr: Quelle est la valeur moyenne extraite pour l'indicateur 'Conso' par année budgétaire ?

question_fr: Affichez les valeurs extraites pour l'indicateur 'D001' avec le nom de la commune correspondante, triées par valeur décroissante.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, e.value FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND e.value != '' ORDER BY CAST(e.value AS REAL) DESC;

question_fr: Quels sont les agrégats financiers (safir_field_id) les plus fréquemment extraits, avec leur nombre d'occurrences ?
sql: SELECT safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS frequence FROM extraction_results GROUP BY safir_field_id ORDER BY frequence DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Affichez les exécutions d'extraction (extraction_runs) avec leur date de début et l'état correspondant pour les documents de 2023.
sql: SELECT er.start_time, s.code AS etat FROM extraction_runs er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id WHERE d.document_year = '2023' ORDER BY er.start_time;

question_fr: Identifiez les communes où la valeur extraite pour l'indicateur 'D001' est supérieure à la moyenne de toutes les valeurs de 'D001'.
sql: WITH moyenne_d001 AS (SELECT AVG(CAST(value AS REAL)) AS moyenne FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'D001' AND value != '') SELECT d.city_name, CAST(e.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND CAST(e.value AS REAL) > (SELECT moyenne FROM moyenne_d001) ORDER BY valeur DESC;

question_fr: Calculez le ratio entre les indicateurs 'D001' et 'DF011' pour chaque commune, en utilisant les valeurs extraites de 2024.
sql: WITH valeurs AS (SELECT d.city_name, MAX(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) END) AS d001, MAX(CASE WHEN e.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(e.value AS REAL) END) AS df011 FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND e.safir_field_id IN ('D001', 'DF011') AND e.value != '' GROUP BY d.city_name, e.document_id) SELECT city_name, d001 / NULLIF(df011, 0) AS ratio FROM valeurs WHERE d001 IS NOT NULL AND df011 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ratio DESC;

question_fr: Analysez la tendance annuelle des valeurs de 'D001' en calculant la variation en pourcentage entre 2023 et 2024 pour chaque commune.
sql: WITH valeurs_par_annee AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, AVG(CAST(e.value AS REAL)) AS moyenne FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND e.value != '' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year), pivot AS (SELECT city_name, MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN moyenne END) AS valeur_2023, MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN moyenne END) AS valeur_2024 FROM valeurs_par_annee GROUP BY city_name) SELECT city_name, valeur_2023, valeur_2024, ((valeur_2024 - valeur_2023) / NULLIF(valeur_2023, 0)) * 100 AS variation_pourcentage FROM pivot WHERE valeur_2023 IS NOT NULL AND valeur_2024 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY variation_pourcentage DESC;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de documents par type de masque (mask) ?
sql: SELECT mask, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents GROUP BY mask;

sql: SELECT DISTINCT city_name FROM documents WHERE budget_type = 'BA' AND document_year = '2023';

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents WHERE nb_pages < 100;

question_fr: Listez les années où il y a des documents avec le format 'image'.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT document_year FROM documents WHERE format = 'image';

question_fr: Pour chaque état (code de states), combien de documents sont dans cet état ?

question_fr: Affichez les documents qui n'ont pas de warning_message.

question_fr: Pour chaque indicateur financier (safir_field_id), calculer le nombre de fois où il a été extrait avec succès (état SUCCESS).

question_fr: Comparez la moyenne des valeurs numériques de 'D001' entre les années 2023 et 2024.
sql: SELECT d.document_year, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS moyenne_valeur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value != '' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Identifier les communes où la valeur de 'Conso' est la plus élevée pour chaque année.
sql: SELECT d.document_year, d.city_name, MAX(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS valeur_max FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value != '' GROUP BY d.document_year, d.city_name;

question_fr: Calculer le taux d'erreur par type de document (mask), basé sur les messages d'erreur dans extraction_results.
sql: SELECT d.mask, COUNT(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error != '' THEN 1 END) AS nombre_erreurs, COUNT(*) AS total_resultats, (COUNT(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error != '' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS taux_erreur_pourcent FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Affichez les valeurs extraites pour tous les indicateurs d'une commune spécifique, par exemple 'COMMUNE DE BONIFACIO', pour l'année 2024.
sql: SELECT er.safir_field_id, er.value FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.city_name = 'COMMUNE DE BONIFACIO' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quel est le ratio entre le nombre de résultats d'extraction et le nombre de pages par document ?
sql: SELECT d.document_id, d.nb_pages, COUNT(er.result_id) AS nombre_resultats, COUNT(er.result_id) * 1.0 / NULLIF(d.nb_pages, 0) AS ratio FROM documents d LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id GROUP BY d.document_id, d.nb_pages;

question_fr: Trouver les indicateurs qui n'ont jamais été extraits avec des erreurs.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT er.safir_field_id FROM extraction_results er WHERE er.safir_field_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT safir_field_id FROM extraction_results WHERE message_error IS NOT NULL AND message_error != '');

question_fr: Analyser la distribution des valeurs de 'DF011' par type de budget.
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, MIN(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS min_valeur, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_valeur, MAX(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS max_valeur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value != '' GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, classer les années basé sur la valeur de 'D001' et identifier l'année avec la valeur maximale.
sql: WITH ranked AS ( SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY d.city_name ORDER BY CAST(er.value AS REAL) DESC) AS rank FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value != '' ) SELECT city_name, document_year, valeur FROM ranked WHERE rank = 1;

question_fr: Identifier les communes où la valeur de 'Conso' est supérieure à deux fois la moyenne.
sql: WITH avg_value AS ( SELECT AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_v FROM extraction_results er WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value != '' ) SELECT d.city_name, er.value FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id CROSS JOIN avg_value WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value != '' AND CAST(er.value AS REAL) > 2 * avg_value.avg_v;

question_fr: Afficher le top 5 des communes avec la plus forte augmentation de la valeur 'D001' entre 2023 et 2024, en pourcentage.
sql: WITH values_2023 AS ( SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur_2023 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value != '' ), values_2024 AS ( SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur_2024 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value != '' ) SELECT v2023.city_name, ((v2024.valeur_2024 - v2023.valeur_2023) / NULLIF(v2023.valeur_2023, 0)) * 100 AS pourcentage_augmentation FROM values_2023 v2023 JOIN values_2024 v2024 ON v2023.city_name = v2024.city_name ORDER BY pourcentage_augmentation DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Pour chaque règle d'extraction (field_rules), trouver les documents où elle a été appliquée et compter les succès et échecs.
sql: SELECT fr.safir_field_id, d.document_id, s.code AS etat, COUNT(*) AS count FROM field_rules fr LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON fr.safir_field_id = er.safir_field_id LEFT JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id LEFT JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id GROUP BY fr.safir_field_id, d.document_id, s.code;

question_fr: Identifiez les documents qui ont des valeurs extraites pour plus de 10 indicateurs financiers distincts.
sql: SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name, d.document_year, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS indicateurs_distincts FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY d.document_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) > 10 ORDER BY indicateurs_distincts DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la variation en pourcentage de la valeur moyenne de 'D001' entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH moyennes AS (SELECT document_year, AVG(CAST(value AS REAL)) AS moyenne_d001 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND er.value != '' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY d.document_year) SELECT (MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN moyenne_d001 END) - MIN(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN moyenne_d001 END)) * 100.0 / MIN(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN moyenne_d001 END) AS variation_pourcent FROM moyennes;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, calculez le ratio entre les indicateurs 'D001' et 'DF011' pour 2024, en excluant les cas où l'un des deux est manquant.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er_d001.value AS REAL) / CAST(er_df011.value AS REAL) AS ratio_d001_df011 FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er_d001 ON d.document_id = er_d001.document_id AND er_d001.safir_field_id = 'D001' JOIN extraction_results er_df011 ON d.document_id = er_df011.document_id AND er_df011.safir_field_id = 'DF011' WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er_d001.value != '' AND er_df011.value != '' AND CAST(er_df011.value AS REAL) != 0;

question_fr: Quelles sont les communes où la valeur de 'Conso' est supérieure à la moyenne de toutes les valeurs de 'Conso' pour 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur_conso FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND er.value != '' AND CAST(er.value AS REAL) > (SELECT AVG(CAST(value AS REAL)) FROM extraction_results er2 JOIN documents d2 ON er2.document_id = d2.document_id WHERE d2.document_year = '2024' AND er2.safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND er2.value != '') ORDER BY valeur_conso DESC;

question_fr: Analysez la tendance des valeurs de 'D001' par commune sur les années 2023 et 2024, en affichant la valeur pour chaque année et le changement absolu.
sql: SELECT city_name, MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS d001_2023, MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS d001_2024, MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) - MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(value AS REAL) END) AS changement_absolu FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND er.value != '' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY city_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT d.document_year) = 2 ORDER BY changement_absolu DESC;

question_fr: Combien de communes distinctes ont soumis des documents en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT siret) AS nb_communes FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quel est le type de budget (BP ou BA) le plus courant pour les documents de 2023 ?
sql: SELECT budget_type, COUNT(*) AS nb_documents FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2023' GROUP BY budget_type ORDER BY nb_documents DESC LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Afficher les documents qui ont plus de 200 pages.
sql: SELECT document_id, city_name, nb_pages FROM documents WHERE nb_pages > 200;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne des valeurs numériques de l'indicateur 'Conso' pour les documents avec masque 'M57_CA' ?
sql: SELECT AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS moyenne_conso FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND d.mask = 'M57_CA';

question_fr: Listez les années budgétaires pour lesquelles nous avons des documents de type 'M4_CFU'.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT document_year FROM documents WHERE mask = 'M4_CFU';

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de résultats d'extraction avec un message d'erreur non vide ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS nb_erreurs FROM extraction_results WHERE message_error IS NOT NULL AND message_error != '';

question_fr: Pour chaque indicateur financier, combien de fois a-t-il été extrait en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT er.safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS nb_extractions FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY er.safir_field_id;

question_fr: Comparez la valeur moyenne de 'D001' entre les communes ayant un budget_type 'BP' et 'BA' pour 2024.
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS moyenne_d001 FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Identifier les communes où la valeur de 'DF011' est supérieure à 1000 en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, er.value FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND CAST(er.value AS REAL) > 1000;

question_fr: Quels sont les indicateurs financiers qui n'ont jamais été extraits avec des valeurs numériques positives ?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT safir_field_id FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT safir_field_id FROM extraction_results WHERE CAST(value AS REAL) > 0);

question_fr: Analyser la distribution des états des documents par année : combien sont en SUCCESS, ERROR, etc. par an ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, s.code AS etat, COUNT(*) AS nb_documents FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id GROUP BY d.document_year, s.code ORDER BY d.document_year, s.code;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, calculer le nombre de documents traités avec succès (état SUCCESS) pour 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, COUNT(*) AS nb_success FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name;

question_fr: Trouver les documents qui ont des valeurs extraites pour l'indicateur 'D001' mais pas pour 'DF011' pour la même année.
sql: SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name FROM documents d WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er1 WHERE er1.document_id = d.document_id AND er1.safir_field_id = 'D001') AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM extraction_results er2 WHERE er2.document_id = d.document_id AND er2.safir_field_id = 'DF011');

question_fr: Quelle est la commune avec la plus forte valeur de 'Conso' en 2023, et quelle est cette valeur ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, er.value FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND d.document_year = '2023' ORDER BY CAST(er.value AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Calculer le ratio des erreurs par type de masque : nombre d'erreurs divisé par nombre total d'extractions.
sql: SELECT d.mask, SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nb_erreurs, COUNT(*) AS nb_total, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS ratio_erreurs FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, identifier l'année où la valeur de 'D001' est maximale, et afficher cette valeur.
sql: WITH ranked AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY d.city_name ORDER BY CAST(er.value AS REAL) DESC) AS rn FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001') SELECT city_name, document_year, valeur FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1;

question_fr: Analyser la tendance : pour chaque indicateur, calculer la variation en pourcentage de la valeur moyenne entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: WITH avg_by_year AS (SELECT er.safir_field_id, d.document_year, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_value FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY er.safir_field_id, d.document_year), pivoted AS (SELECT safir_field_id, MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN avg_value END) AS avg_2023, MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN avg_value END) AS avg_2024 FROM avg_by_year GROUP BY safir_field_id) SELECT safir_field_id, avg_2023, avg_2024, (avg_2024 - avg_2023) / NULLIF(avg_2023, 0) * 100 AS variation_pourcentage FROM pivoted WHERE avg_2023 IS NOT NULL AND avg_2024 IS NOT NULL;

question_fr: Trouver les paires de communes qui ont des valeurs similaires pour 'D001' en 2024, définies comme différant de moins de 10%.
sql: WITH valeurs AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT v1.city_name AS commune1, v2.city_name AS commune2, v1.valeur AS valeur1, v2.valeur AS valeur2 FROM valeurs v1 CROSS JOIN valeurs v2 WHERE v1.city_name < v2.city_name AND ABS(v1.valeur - v2.valeur) / NULLIF((v1.valeur + v2.valeur)/2, 0) < 0.1;

question_fr: Quels sont les documents qui ont des valeurs extraites pour tous les indicateurs d'un certain groupe, par exemple tous les indicateurs commençant par 'D' ?
sql: WITH indicateurs_D AS (SELECT DISTINCT safir_field_id FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id LIKE 'D%' AND value IS NOT NULL AND value != ''), documents_with_counts AS (SELECT er.document_id, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS nb_indicateurs FROM extraction_results er WHERE er.safir_field_id LIKE 'D%' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value != '' GROUP BY er.document_id), total_indicateurs AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM indicateurs_D) SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name FROM documents d JOIN documents_with_counts dwc ON d.document_id = dwc.document_id CROSS JOIN total_indicateurs ti WHERE dwc.nb_indicateurs = ti.total;

question_fr: Combien de documents avons-nous pour l'année 2023 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Combien de communes distinctes ont soumis des documents de type budget principal (BP) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT city_name) FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' AND budget_type = 'BP';

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne du nombre de pages pour les documents en état d'erreur ?

question_fr: Quels sont les masques de document utilisés pour les budgets annexes (BA) ?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT mask FROM documents WHERE budget_type = 'BA';

question_fr: Quelle est la valeur de l'indicateur 'DF011' pour la commune 'EUROMETROPOLE STRASBOURG' en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT er.value FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.city_name = 'EUROMETROPOLE STRASBOURG' AND d.document_year = '2023' AND er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Combien de résultats d'extraction avons-nous pour l'indicateur 'Conso' en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'Conso';

question_fr: Quel est le nombre de documents avec état SUCCESS en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Comment a évolué la valeur moyenne de l'indicateur 'D001' entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) as moyenne FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND er.value != '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Identifier les communes avec la valeur de 'DF011' la plus basse en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, er.value FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND er.value != '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CAST(er.value AS REAL) ASC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Pour chaque type de masque, quel est le taux d'erreur dans les extractions ?
sql: SELECT d.mask, SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND er.message_error != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) as taux_erreur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des valeurs de l'indicateur 'D001' par type de budget (BP ou BA) pour 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) as moyenne FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND er.value != '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Identifier les documents où le nombre de pages est supérieur à 1.5 fois la moyenne.
sql: SELECT document_id, nb_pages FROM documents WHERE nb_pages > (SELECT AVG(nb_pages) * 1.5 FROM documents WHERE nb_pages IS NOT NULL) AND nb_pages IS NOT NULL;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, calculer la variation de la valeur de 'D001' entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: WITH vals AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, CAST(er.value AS REAL) as val FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND er.value != '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL) SELECT city_name, MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2024' THEN val END) - MAX(CASE WHEN document_year = '2023' THEN val END) as variation FROM vals GROUP BY city_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT document_year) = 2;

question_fr: Pour chaque indicateur financier, combien de fois a-t-il été extrait avec succès (sans erreur) en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT er.safir_field_id, COUNT(*) as succes_count FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND (er.message_error IS NULL OR er.message_error = '') GROUP BY er.safir_field_id;

question_fr: Classer les communes par la valeur totale de l'indicateur 'Conso' pour 2024.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) as total_conso FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND er.value != '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY total_conso DESC;

question_fr: Analyser la tendance des valeurs de 'DF011' par commune sur les deux dernières années, en identifiant celles avec une croissance.
sql: WITH yearly_vals AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, CAST(er.value AS REAL) as val FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND er.value != '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL), ranked AS (SELECT city_name, document_year, val, LAG(val) OVER (PARTITION BY city_name ORDER BY document_year) as prev_val FROM yearly_vals) SELECT DISTINCT city_name FROM ranked WHERE document_year = '2024' AND val > prev_val AND prev_val IS NOT NULL;

question_fr: Identifier les documents où les valeurs extraites pour 'D001' et 'DF011' ne sont pas cohérentes (ratio hors de la plage normale entre 0.5 et 2).
sql: SELECT d.document_id, er1.value as d001_val, er2.value as df011_val FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er1 ON d.document_id = er1.document_id AND er1.safir_field_id = 'D001' JOIN extraction_results er2 ON d.document_id = er2.document_id AND er2.safir_field_id = 'DF011' WHERE CAST(er1.value AS REAL) / NULLIF(CAST(er2.value AS REAL), 0) NOT BETWEEN 0.5 AND 2.0 AND er1.value != '' AND er2.value != '' AND er1.value IS NOT NULL AND er2.value IS NOT NULL;

question_fr: Pour les indicateurs avec feedback de correction, calculer la différence moyenne entre la valeur extraite et la valeur corrigée.
sql: SELECT er.safir_field_id, AVG(ABS(CAST(er.value AS REAL) - CAST(rf.corrected_value AS REAL))) as diff_moyenne FROM extraction_results er JOIN resultfeedbacks rf ON er.result_id = rf.result_id WHERE er.value != '' AND rf.corrected_value != '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND rf.corrected_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY er.safir_field_id;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune et année, calculer le taux de succès des extractions.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN s.code = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) as taux_succes FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year;

question_fr: Pour 2024, quelles sont les 5 communes ayant les plus hauts montants pour l'indicateur de dépenses d'équipement (D001) ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur_d001 FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' ORDER BY CAST(er.value AS REAL) DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Combien de documents budgétaires avons-nous traités avec succès (état validé) pour l'année 2023 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents_valides FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'VALIDATED' AND d.document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Quel est le nombre moyen de pages pour les documents de type M57_CA ?
sql: SELECT AVG(nb_pages) AS moyenne_pages FROM documents WHERE mask = 'M57_CA';

question_fr: Listez les communes distinctes ayant soumis des budgets annexes (BA) en 2024.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT city_name FROM documents WHERE budget_type = 'BA' AND document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quel est le total des valeurs extraites pour l'indicateur de consommation (Conso) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CAST(value AS REAL)) AS total_conso FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND value != '' AND value NOT NULL;

question_fr: Combien de documents ont été traités avec un format PDF en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS nombre_pdf FROM documents WHERE format = 'pdf' AND document_year = '2023';

question_fr: Quelle est la valeur maximale de l'indicateur DF011 pour l'année 2024 parmi les budgets principaux (BP) ?
sql: SELECT MAX(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS valeur_max_df011 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND value != '' AND value NOT NULL;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de valeurs extraites sans erreur (message d'erreur vide) pour 2024 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS valeurs_sans_erreur FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE (er.message_error = '' OR er.message_error IS NULL) AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Pour chaque année, comparez le nombre de documents avec le masque M57_CFU versus M4_CFU.
sql: SELECT document_year, mask, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents WHERE mask IN ('M57_CFU', 'M4_CFU') GROUP BY document_year, mask ORDER BY document_year, mask;

question_fr: Quelles sont les communes où la valeur de l'indicateur D001 a augmenté de plus de 20% entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH valeurs_2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS val_2023 FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023'), valeurs_2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS val_2024 FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT v23.city_name, v23.val_2023, v24.val_2024, (v24.val_2024 - v23.val_2023) / v23.val_2023 * 100 AS pourcentage_augmentation FROM valeurs_2023 v23 JOIN valeurs_2024 v24 ON v23.city_name = v24.city_name WHERE v23.val_2023 > 0 AND ((v24.val_2024 - v23.val_2023) / v23.val_2023) > 0.2;

question_fr: Identifiez les indicateurs financiers ayant le plus grand nombre d'extractions avec des avertissements (message_warning non vide) en 2024.
sql: SELECT er.safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS nombre_avertissements FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.message_warning IS NOT NULL AND er.message_warning != '' GROUP BY er.safir_field_id ORDER BY nombre_avertissements DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelle est la distribution des états des documents (SUCCESS, ERROR, etc.) pour les budgets annexes (BA) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT s.code AS etat, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY s.code ORDER BY nombre_documents DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 3 communes ayant la plus faible valeur pour l'indicateur DF011 en 2024, parmi celles avec au moins 2 documents traités ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, MIN(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS valeur_min_df011 FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY city_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY valeur_min_df011 ASC LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Calculez le ratio moyen entre les indicateurs D001 et DF011 pour chaque commune en 2024, en excluant les cas où DF011 est nul ou zéro.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, AVG(CAST(er_d001.value AS REAL) / CAST(er_df011.value AS REAL)) AS ratio_moyen FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er_d001 ON d.document_id = er_d001.document_id AND er_d001.safir_field_id = 'D001' JOIN extraction_results er_df011 ON d.document_id = er_df011.document_id AND er_df011.safir_field_id = 'DF011' WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er_df011.value != '' AND CAST(er_df011.value AS REAL) != 0 GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY ratio_moyen DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque type de masque, quel est le pourcentage de documents avec plus de 200 pages ?
sql: SELECT mask, COUNT(CASE WHEN nb_pages > 200 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS pourcentage_gros_documents FROM documents GROUP BY mask ORDER BY pourcentage_gros_documents DESC;

question_fr: Quels indicateurs financiers n'ont jamais été extraits avec des valeurs numériques supérieures à 1000 en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT safir_field_id FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT er.safir_field_id FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.value != '' AND CAST(er.value AS REAL) > 1000);

question_fr: Analysez la corrélation entre le nombre de pages d'un document et le nombre d'erreurs d'extraction pour 2024, en affichant les documents avec plus de 5 erreurs.
sql: SELECT d.document_id, d.city_name, d.nb_pages, COUNT(CASE WHEN er.message_error != '' AND er.message_error IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS nombre_erreurs FROM documents d LEFT JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.document_id, d.city_name, d.nb_pages HAVING nombre_erreurs > 5 ORDER BY nombre_erreurs DESC, d.nb_pages DESC;

question_fr: Identifiez les anomalies budgétaires en comparant les ratios D001/DF011 entre communes de même type de budget (BP/BA) pour 2024, où l'écart dépasse 50% de la moyenne du groupe.
sql: WITH ratios AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.budget_type, CAST(er_d001.value AS REAL) / NULLIF(CAST(er_df011.value AS REAL), 0) AS ratio FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er_d001 ON d.document_id = er_d001.document_id AND er_d001.safir_field_id = 'D001' JOIN extraction_results er_df011 ON d.document_id = er_df011.document_id AND er_df011.safir_field_id = 'DF011' WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er_d001.value != '' AND er_df011.value != '' AND CAST(er_df011.value AS REAL) != 0), moyennes AS (SELECT budget_type, AVG(ratio) AS ratio_moyen FROM ratios GROUP BY budget_type) SELECT r.city_name, r.budget_type, r.ratio, m.ratio_moyen, ABS(r.ratio - m.ratio_moyen) / m.ratio_moyen AS ecart_relatif FROM ratios r JOIN moyennes m ON r.budget_type = m.budget_type WHERE ABS(r.ratio - m.ratio_moyen) / m.ratio_moyen > 0.5 ORDER BY ecart_relatif DESC;

question_fr: Détectez les communes où la valeur de l'indicateur Conso a fluctué de plus de 30% entre les années consécutives disponibles (par exemple, de 2023 à 2024).
sql: WITH valeurs_par_annee AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, CAST(er.value AS REAL) AS valeur FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND er.value != ''), variations AS (SELECT v1.city_name, v1.document_year AS annee_from, v2.document_year AS annee_to, v1.valeur AS val_from, v2.valeur AS val_from, (v2.valeur - v1.valeur) / v1.valeur * 100 AS pourcentage_changement FROM valeurs_par_annee v1 JOIN valeurs_par_annee v2 ON v1.city_name = v2.city_name AND CAST(v2.document_year AS INTEGER) = CAST(v1.document_year AS INTEGER) + 1) SELECT city_name, annee_from, annee_to, val_from, val_from, pourcentage_changement FROM variations WHERE ABS(pourcentage_changement) > 30 ORDER BY ABS(pourcentage_changement) DESC;

question_fr: Évaluez la qualité d'extraction par commune en 2024, en calculant un score basé sur le taux de succès (valeurs extraites sans erreur) et le nombre d'indicateurs extraits.
sql: WITH extractions_par_commune AS (SELECT d.city_name, COUNT(*) AS total_extractions, COUNT(CASE WHEN er.message_error = '' OR er.message_error IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS extractions_sans_erreur, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS indicateurs_distincts FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name) SELECT city_name, total_extractions, extractions_sans_erreur, indicateurs_distincts, (extractions_sans_erreur * 1.0 / total_extractions) * 100 AS taux_succes FROM extractions_par_commune ORDER BY taux_succes DESC, indicateurs_distincts DESC;

question_fr: Combien de communes distinctes ont soumis des documents de type M57_CA en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT siret) AS nombre_communes FROM documents WHERE mask = 'M57_CA' AND document_year = '2024';

sql: SELECT AVG(CAST(value AS REAL)) AS moyenne_d001 FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'D001' AND document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2023');

question_fr: Listez les communes avec des documents en état 'ERROR' pour 2024.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT city_name FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'ERROR' AND document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Combien de valeurs ont été extraites pour l'indicateur 'Conso' en 2024, quelle que soit leur valeur ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS nombre_extractions FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024');

question_fr: Quel est le type de budget (BP ou BA) le plus fréquent parmi les documents de 2023 ?
sql: SELECT budget_type, COUNT(*) AS nombre FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2023' GROUP BY budget_type ORDER BY nombre DESC LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Quelle est la valeur maximale de l'indicateur 'DF011' extraite pour 2024 ?
sql: SELECT MAX(CAST(value AS REAL)) AS valeur_max FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024');

question_fr: Combien de documents ont été traités avec un format 'pdf' en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS nombre FROM documents WHERE format = 'pdf' AND document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quelle est la commune avec la plus forte valeur de l'indicateur 'Conso' en 2023, et quelle est cette valeur ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, MAX(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS valeur_max FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY valeur_max DESC LIMIT 1;

question_fr: Pour chaque indicateur financier, calculez le nombre d'extractions réussies (sans message d'erreur) en 2024.
sql: SELECT safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS extractions_reussies FROM extraction_results WHERE message_error IS NULL OR message_error = '' AND document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') GROUP BY safir_field_id;

question_fr: Comparez le nombre de documents entre les budgets principaux (BP) et annexes (BA) pour chaque année.
sql: SELECT document_year, budget_type, COUNT(*) AS nombre FROM documents GROUP BY document_year, budget_type ORDER BY document_year, budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec les plus hautes valeurs moyennes de l'indicateur 'D001' en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS moyenne_d001 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY moyenne_d001 DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Pour chaque type de masque, calculez le taux de documents en état 'SUCCESS' en 2024.
sql: SELECT d.mask, COUNT(CASE WHEN s.code = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS taux_success FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.mask;

question_fr: Quels sont les indicateurs financiers qui ont été extraits avec des valeurs non numériques (par exemple, texte) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT safir_field_id FROM extraction_results WHERE document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') AND value GLOB '*[a-zA-Z]*';

question_fr: Calculez le nombre total de pages pour tous les documents de chaque commune en 2023, et triez par ordre décroissant.
sql: SELECT city_name, SUM(nb_pages) AS total_pages FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2023' GROUP BY city_name ORDER BY total_pages DESC;

question_fr: Identifiez les communes où la valeur de l'indicateur 'DF011' a augmenté de plus de 10% entre 2023 et 2024.
sql: WITH valeurs_2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_2023 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name), valeurs_2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_2024 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name) SELECT v2023.city_name, v2023.avg_2023, v2024.avg_2024, (v2024.avg_2024 - v2023.avg_2023) * 100.0 / v2023.avg_2023 AS pourcentage_augmentation FROM valeurs_2023 v2023 JOIN valeurs_2024 v2024 ON v2023.city_name = v2024.city_name WHERE v2024.avg_2024 > v2023.avg_2023 * 1.1;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, calculez un score de qualité d'extraction basé sur le taux de valeurs extraites sans erreur et le nombre d'indicateurs uniques extraits en 2024.
sql: WITH qualite AS (SELECT d.city_name, COUNT(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NULL OR er.message_error = '' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS taux_success, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS indicateurs_uniques FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name) SELECT city_name, taux_success, indicateurs_uniques, (taux_success * 0.7 + indicateurs_uniques * 0.3) AS score_qualite FROM qualite ORDER BY score_qualite DESC;

question_fr: Trouvez les paires d'indicateurs financiers qui sont souvent extraits ensemble (dans les mêmes documents) en 2024, avec un taux de co-occurrence supérieur à 80%.
sql: WITH indicateurs_docs AS (SELECT er1.safir_field_id AS indicateur1, er2.safir_field_id AS indicateur2, COUNT(DISTINCT er1.document_id) AS co_occurrences FROM extraction_results er1 JOIN extraction_results er2 ON er1.document_id = er2.document_id AND er1.safir_field_id < er2.safir_field_id WHERE er1.document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') GROUP BY er1.safir_field_id, er2.safir_field_id), total_docs AS (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT document_id) AS total FROM extraction_results WHERE document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024')) SELECT indicateur1, indicateur2, co_occurrences, co_occurrences * 100.0 / total AS taux FROM indicateurs_docs, total_docs WHERE taux > 80 ORDER BY taux DESC;

question_fr: Détectez les anomalies budgétaires en identifiant les communes où le ratio entre les indicateurs 'D001' et 'DF011' en 2024 s'écarte de plus de 50% de la moyenne nationale.
sql: WITH ratios AS (SELECT d.city_name, AVG(CAST(er1.value AS REAL) / NULLIF(CAST(er2.value AS REAL), 0)) AS ratio_local FROM extraction_results er1 JOIN extraction_results er2 ON er1.document_id = er2.document_id JOIN documents d ON er1.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er1.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND er2.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name), moyenne_nationale AS (SELECT AVG(CAST(er1.value AS REAL) / NULLIF(CAST(er2.value AS REAL), 0)) AS ratio_moyen FROM extraction_results er1 JOIN extraction_results er2 ON er1.document_id = er2.document_id JOIN documents d ON er1.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er1.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND er2.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024') SELECT r.city_name, r.ratio_local, m.ratio_moyen, ABS(r.ratio_local - m.ratio_moyen) * 100.0 / m.ratio_moyen AS ecart_pourcentage FROM ratios r, moyenne_nationale m WHERE ecart_pourcentage > 50;

question_fr: Quelle est la dépense moyenne d'investissement (D001) par commune pour l'année 2024, en excluant les valeurs nulles ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS moyenne_D001 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND er.value <> '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value GLOB '*[0-9.]*' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY moyenne_D001 DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les communes ayant soumis des documents avec plus de 200 pages en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT city_name FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' AND nb_pages > 200 ORDER BY city_name;

question_fr: Combien de valeurs extraites pour l'indicateur de consommation (Conso) sont non nulles en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS nombre_valeurs FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2023') AND value IS NOT NULL AND value <> '';

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des types de budget (BP ou BA) parmi les documents de 2024 ?
sql: SELECT budget_type, COUNT(*) AS nombre FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' AND budget_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY budget_type;

question_fr: Listez les communes avec au moins un document en format PDF pour l'année 2023.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT city_name FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2023' AND format = 'pdf' ORDER BY city_name;

question_fr: Quel est le nombre total de pages pour les documents de type M57_CA en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(nb_pages) AS total_pages FROM documents WHERE mask = 'M57_CA' AND document_year = '2024' AND nb_pages IS NOT NULL;

question_fr: Combien de documents sont en état 'ERROR' pour l'année 2024 ?
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS nombre_erreurs FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND s.code = 'ERROR';

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, calculez la somme des dépenses d'équipement (D001) pour 2024, et classez-les par ordre décroissant.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS total_D001 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND er.value <> '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value GLOB '*[0-9.]*' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY total_D001 DESC;

question_fr: Comparez le nombre de documents traités avec succès (état SUCCESS) entre 2023 et 2024 pour chaque type de masque.
sql: SELECT mask, document_year, COUNT(*) AS nombre_succes FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'SUCCESS' AND document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY mask, document_year ORDER BY mask, document_year;

question_fr: Quels sont les 3 indicateurs financiers les plus fréquemment extraits en 2024, et combien de fois chacun a-t-il été extrait ?
sql: SELECT safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS frequence FROM extraction_results WHERE document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') GROUP BY safir_field_id ORDER BY frequence DESC LIMIT 3;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, identifiez le type de budget (BP ou BA) dominant en 2024 (celui avec le plus de documents).
sql: WITH budget_counts AS (SELECT city_name, budget_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' AND budget_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY city_name, budget_type) SELECT bc.city_name, bc.budget_type FROM budget_counts bc INNER JOIN (SELECT city_name, MAX(count) AS max_count FROM budget_counts GROUP BY city_name) maxbc ON bc.city_name = maxbc.city_name AND bc.count = maxbc.max_count ORDER BY bc.city_name;

question_fr: Quelles sont les communes où la valeur de l'indicateur DF011 a dépassé 1000 en 2024, et quelle est cette valeur ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, er.value AS valeur_DF011 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND CAST(er.value AS REAL) > 1000 ORDER BY CAST(er.value AS REAL) DESC;

question_fr: Calculez le taux d'échec des extractions (proportion de résultats avec message d'erreur non vide) par indicateur financier pour 2023.
sql: SELECT safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN message_error IS NOT NULL AND message_error <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS erreurs, ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN message_error IS NOT NULL AND message_error <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS taux_erreur_percent FROM extraction_results WHERE document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2023') GROUP BY safir_field_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY taux_erreur_percent DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque type de masque, quel est le nombre moyen de pages des documents en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT mask, AVG(nb_pages) AS moyenne_pages FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' AND nb_pages IS NOT NULL GROUP BY mask ORDER BY moyenne_pages DESC;

question_fr: Identifiez les communes avec des documents en état 'PARTIAL' en 2024, et comptez combien de documents par commune.
sql: SELECT d.city_name, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents_partiels FROM documents d JOIN states s ON d.state_id = s.state_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND s.code = 'PARTIAL' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY nombre_documents_partiels DESC;

question_fr: Pour chaque commune, calculez la variation en pourcentage de la valeur moyenne de l'indicateur D001 entre 2023 et 2024, en ne considérant que les communes avec des données pour les deux années.
sql: WITH valeurs_2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_2023 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2023' AND er.value <> '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value GLOB '*[0-9.]*' GROUP BY d.city_name), valeurs_2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, AVG(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS avg_2024 FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND er.value <> '' AND er.value IS NOT NULL AND er.value GLOB '*[0-9.]*' GROUP BY d.city_name) SELECT v23.city_name, v23.avg_2023, v24.avg_2024, ROUND((v24.avg_2024 - v23.avg_2023) / v23.avg_2023 * 100, 2) AS variation_percent FROM valeurs_2023 v23 JOIN valeurs_2024 v24 ON v23.city_name = v24.city_name ORDER BY variation_percent DESC;

question_fr: Détectez les anomalies budgétaires en identifiant les communes où le ratio D001/DF011 en 2024 est supérieur à 2 ou inférieur à 0.5, en excluant les divisions par zéro.
sql: WITH ratios AS (SELECT d.city_name, CASE WHEN df011.value IS NOT NULL AND df011.value <> '' AND CAST(df011.value AS REAL) != 0 THEN CAST(d001.value AS REAL) / CAST(df011.value AS REAL) ELSE NULL END AS ratio FROM (SELECT document_id, value FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'D001' AND document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') AND value <> '' AND value IS NOT NULL AND value GLOB '*[0-9.]*') d001 JOIN (SELECT document_id, value FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'DF011' AND document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') AND value <> '' AND value IS NOT NULL AND value GLOB '*[0-9.]*') df011 ON d001.document_id = df011.document_id JOIN documents d ON d001.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d001.value IS NOT NULL AND df011.value IS NOT NULL) SELECT city_name, ratio FROM ratios WHERE ratio IS NOT NULL AND (ratio > 2 OR ratio < 0.5) ORDER BY ratio DESC;

question_fr: Évaluez la qualité d'extraction par commune en 2024 avec un score basé sur le taux de résultats sans erreur et le nombre d'indicateurs uniques extraits, en pondérant ces facteurs.
sql: WITH qualite AS (SELECT d.city_name, COUNT(*) AS total_resultats, SUM(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NULL OR er.message_error = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS resultats_sans_erreur, COUNT(DISTINCT er.safir_field_id) AS indicateurs_uniques FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name) SELECT city_name, total_resultats, resultats_sans_erreur, indicateurs_uniques, ROUND((CAST(resultats_sans_erreur AS REAL) / total_resultats * 0.7 + CAST(indicateurs_uniques AS REAL) / (SELECT MAX(indicateurs_uniques) FROM qualite) * 0.3) * 100, 2) AS score_qualite FROM qualite WHERE total_resultats > 0 ORDER BY score_qualite DESC;

question_fr: Identifiez les indicateurs financiers qui ont été extraits avec des valeurs non numériques (par exemple du texte) en 2024, et combien de fois cela s'est produit.
sql: SELECT safir_field_id, COUNT(*) AS occurrences_non_numeriques FROM extraction_results WHERE document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024') AND value IS NOT NULL AND value <> '' AND value NOT GLOB '*[0-9.]*' GROUP BY safir_field_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY occurrences_non_numeriques DESC;
